meaning: 湖北(位于中国中南部、长江中游)
examples: He was born in Qichun, Hubei in 1518.
Qu Yuan was born in Zigui of Hubei Province over 2,200 years ago.
For example, the city government in Wuhan, the capital of Hubei Province, has recently built a new exhibition hall.
"Peasants are more sophisticated these days, " says Wang Qin, a math teacher in a Hubei village school.
